LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT JAMES HENRION'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT FILED THIS MOTION WITHIN A REASONABLE TIME AND DEMONSTRATES EXCUSABLE NEGLECT. DEFENDANT SHALL FILE AND SERVE A PLEADING RESPONSIVE TO THE COMPLAINT BY DECEMBER 18, 2013. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, COURT REPORTER: LAURA MARTINEZ, CSR #11332
MINI MINUTES FOR DEC-17-2013 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Dec-17-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: ROBERT JAVAN, ESQ., 916.649.8333, FOR PLAINTIFF SAFECO INSURANCE COMPANY.
STEVEN SCOTT, ESQ., 925.825.9500, FOR DEFENDANT JAMES HENRION.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling: DEFENDANT JAMES HENRION'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND is granted. Defendant filed this motion within a reasonable time and demonstrates excusable neglect. Defendant shall file and serve a pleading responsive to the complaint by December 18, 2013. Order signed in open court. Judge: A. James Robertson II; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Court Reporter: Laura Martinez, CSR #11332
